title: Warhammer Quest - Take a Look - Part 7 - The Warrior Expansions part B
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1qYWYaGdxt4

Daniel (@dungeondive) continues through the warrior expansions with three more characters joining the roster. This is the last Warhammer Quest instalment for a while — Daniel needs a breather after seven parts in rapid succession — so he makes it count.

The warriors covered here round out the retail releases, each with their own quirks and party dynamics. The series is building toward the truly deep cuts: the White Dwarf content, the fan-made material, and everything that followed the official releases.

----

When you're deep into a series, do you binge it all at once or space it out?
